---
format: 
  html:
    link-external-icon: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
from: markdown+autolink_bare_uris
number-depth: 2
toc-depth: 2
date: last-modified
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY -- HH:mm:ss (z)"
---

# Welcome to the OUCRU Introduction to Medical Statistics 2026 {.unnumbered}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## 📅 Logistics & Schedule
* **Time:** 09:15 – 16:45 (UTC +7) daily
* **Lunch Break:** 12:30 – 13:30 (UTC +7)
* **Full Schedule:** [Download Timetable (PDF)](handouts/Agenda_StatCourse_23-27March2026.pdf)
* *Note: Lunch is provided for in-person attendees.*
:::

## Contributors {.unnumbered}

::: {layout-ncol=2}
* **Prof. Ronald Geskus** (Biostatistics, OUCRU HCM)
* **Dr. Duc Du Hong** (Biostatistics, OUCRU HCM)
* **Dr. Hoang Van Thuan** (Biostatistics, OUCRU HCM)
* **Dr. Nguyen Lam Vuong** (Biostatistics, OUCRU HCM)
* **Dr. Tran Thai Hung** (Biostatistics, OUCRU HCM)

:::

---

# Pre-course Setup

::: {.callout-tip}
## 🛠️ Choose Your Environment
You have two ways to follow the course exercises:

1.  **Zero Setup:** Use the **Web-R** versions directly in your browser.
2.  **Local Setup:** If you prefer using **RStudio**, please follow the [Pre-course Setup Handout](handouts/precourse_setup.qmd){target="_blank"} before the course begins.
:::

# Course Topics

## Day 1: Descriptive and Exploratory Data Analysis 

### 🧑‍🏫 Lead instructors: Ronald and Duc

### ☀️ Morning: Descriptive Analysis

::: {layout-ncol=2}

**Contents:**
- 1. Data characteristics & Variable types
- 2. Numerical & Graphical summaries
- 3. Intro to R and RStudio

**Lecture:** [Slides](slides/day_1/1.SlidesDescriptives.pdf)
**Exercises:**
- [Web-R version](handouts/day_1/Exercise1_Webr.html){target="_blank"}
- [RStudio version](handouts/day_1/ExerciseRStudio.html){target="_blank"} ([Download Script](handouts/day_1/ExerciseCode.R))
**Answers:**
<div id="morning-answers">
  <button onclick="unlockMorning()" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">Click to unlock answers</button>
</div>

<script>
function unlockMorning() {
  var password = prompt("Please enter the session code provided in class:");
  if (password === "OUCRU2026") {
    document.getElementById("morning-answers").innerHTML = 
      '<a href="handouts/day_1/ExerciseAnswers.html" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" target="_blank">RStudio Answers</a> ' +
      '<a href="handouts/day_1/ExerciseAnswers.pdf" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" target="_blank">PDF</a>';
  } else {
    alert("Incorrect code. Please ask the instructor for the password.");
  }
}
</script>

:::

### 🌤️ Afternoon: Exploratory Analysis

::: {layout-ncol=2}

**Contents:**
- 1. (Baseline) tables
- 2. Graphs for categorical variables
- 3. Numeric variables by group
- 4. 2-variable numeric plots

**Lecture:** [Slides](slides/day_1/2.SlidesEDA.pdf)
**Exercises:**
- [Web-R version](handouts/day_1/ExerciseWebr-2.html){target="_blank"}
- [RStudio version](handouts/day_1/ExerciseRStudio-2.html){target="_blank"} ([Download Script](handouts/day_1/ExerciseCode-2.R))
**Answers:**
<div id="afternoon-answers">
  <button onclick="unlockAfternoon()" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">Click to unlock answers</button>
</div>

<script>
function unlockAfternoon() {
  var password = prompt("Please enter the session code provided in class:");
  if (password === "OUCRU2026") {
    document.getElementById("afternoon-answers").innerHTML = 
      '<a href="handouts/day_1/ExerciseWebrAnswers-2.html" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" target="_blank">Web-R Answers</a> ' +
      '<a href="handouts/day_1/ExerciseAnswers-2.html" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" target="_blank">RStudio Answers</a>';
  } else {
    alert("Incorrect code.");
  }
}
</script>

:::

---
